channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Democratic Representative Calls Trump an Adjudicated Rapist on MSNBC, Host Issues Terminology Clarification
item.description: During a Saturday afternoon segment on MSNBC's MS NOW, host Alex Witt interviewed Rep. Melanie Stansbury (D-NM) about former Attorney General Pam Bondi's combative appearance before the House Oversigh...

item.title: Peter Obi Nominates Rabiu Musa Kwankwaso as Running Mate After Securing NDC Presidential Ticket for 2027
item.description: Peter Obi, the presidential candidate of the Nigeria Democratic Congress (NDC) for the 2027 general election, has nominated former Kano State Governor, Rabiu Musa Kwankwaso, as his vice-presidential c...

item.title: Anambra Government Gives Mortuary Operators June 5 Deadline for Registration and Licence Renewal
item.description: The Anambra State Government has directed all mortuary owners and operators across the state to register their facilities or renew expired licences as part of ongoing reforms aimed at strengthening re...

item.title: Poll suggests millions of UK voters were exposed to political deepfakes before local elections
item.description: New polling commissioned by the cross-party think tank Demos indicates that political deepfakes have become a significant issue in the United Kingdom's electoral environment. According to a survey of ...

item.title: Five People Rescued from Laos Cave After Over a Week Trapped
item.description: A daring rescue operation in Laos successfully brought five people out of a remote cave after they had been trapped for more than a week. The mission, described as complex and challenging, involved sp...

item.title: Security Forces Neutralise Eight Militants in Darra Adamkhel During Ongoing Operation
item.description: On Saturday, security forces in Khyber Pakhtunkhwa’s Darra Adamkhel successfully killed eight militants, including two Afghan nationals linked to the banned Tariq Gidar group, an affiliate of the pros...

item.title: Derek O'Brien raises security concerns with Amit Shah after Abhishek Banerjee faces mob attack in West Bengal
item.description: Trinamool Congress (TMC) Rajya Sabha MP Derek O'Brien has raised serious concerns over the security situation in West Bengal after party leader and Lok Sabha MP Abhishek Banerjee was allegedly attacke...

item.title: Declining house prices put first home buyers at financial risk under deposit scheme
item.description: The government's first home deposit scheme, aimed at helping Australians purchase their first property, is facing unexpected challenges as property prices in several major cities have fallen. More tha...

item.title: Series of weak offshore earthquakes recorded near Bolinao, Pangasinan under West Philippine Sea monitoring
item.description: A series of weak offshore earthquakes has been detected in the coastal waters of Bolinao, Pangasinan, prompting closer monitoring from the Philippine Institute of Volcanology and Seismology (Phivolcs)...

item.title: Robin Padilla criticises long-serving senators over lack of gains for workers and poor Filipinos
item.description: Senator Robin Padilla publicly criticised long-serving members of the Philippine Senate, accusing them of failing to deliver meaningful improvements for ordinary Filipinos, particularly workers, farme...

item.title: Kwara Governor Explains Governors’ Response to PMS Subsidy Removal and Advocates ₦100,000 Minimum Wage
item.description: For one Sallah and third-anniversary dinner wey President Tinubu host for Presidential Villa, Kwara State Governor and Chairman of the Nigeria Governors' Forum, AbdulRahman AbdulRazaq, talk how state ...

item.title: Ralph De Leon at TNVS Drivers Accused of Altering Sarah G's Lyrics on Everybody Sing
item.description: The article reports a moment from ABS-CBN's Everybody Sing where Ralph De Leon and TNVS drivers may have altered the lyrics of a song originally by Sarah G. The post, published May 30, 2026, discusses...

item.title: Sara Duterte leads Leni Robredo in Pulse Asia survey for 2028 presidential race
item.description: According to a recent Pulse Asia survey commissioned by the Stratbase Group, Vice President Sara Duterte continues to hold a lead over Naga City Mayor Leni Robredo in a hypothetical two-way contest fo...

item.title: Job cuts in ACT City and Environment Directorate spark concerns over service standards and capacity
item.description: The Canberra Times reports that the ACT Government’s City and Environment Directorate is set to cut more than 100 jobs as part of efforts to manage ongoing budget pressures. The reduction represents a...

item.title: 15-Year-Old Vaibhav Sooryavanshi Impresses in IPL as Australians Shine in T20
item.description: In this year’s Indian Premier League, 15-year-old Vaibhav Sooryavanshi has emerged as a standout talent, capturing the attention of cricket fans worldwide. Mitchell Johnson highlights the youngster's ...

item.title: Bruce Springsteen criticises Trump’s proposed fund for Capitol rioters
item.description: During a concert at Nationals Park in Washington DC on 27 May 2026, Bruce Springsteen expressed strong condemnation of the Justice Department’s recently announced $1.776 billion “anti-weaponisation fu...

item.title: NMB Bank’s Transformation Highlighted at Cambridge Africa Business Conference
item.description: Ruth Zaipuna, the Managing Director and CEO of NMB Bank Plc, represented Tanzania’s banking progress at the Cambridge Africa Business Conference 2026 held in the United Kingdom. She delivered a keynot...

item.title: Understanding Sleep Paralysis and Its Medical Causes
item.description: Plenty Nigerians dey wake up sometime, unable to move, talk or shout for help, and dem dey always dey fear say na spiritual attack. Dem fit talk say 'something dey press me' or 'witch hold me down'. B...

item.title: Arsenal v PSG Champions League final level at 1-1 after 90 minutes and heads into extra time
item.description: The Champions League final between Arsenal and Paris Saint-Germain remained finely poised after 90 intense minutes in Budapest ended 1-1, sending the match into extra time. Arsenal made a dream start ...

item.title: Harbhajan Singh meets Amit Shah after joining BJP; discusses Punjab development amid AAP political controversy
item.description: Former Indian cricketer and Rajya Sabha MP Harbhajan Singh met Union Home Minister Amit Shah in New Delhi shortly after joining the Bharatiya Janata Party (BJP), marking a significant political develo...
